description: New file. pub fn fuse_blocks(m: &mut Module). Fixed-point loop: scan Goto/If terminators for predecessor counts; for each non-entry block B with predecessor_count==1 whose sole predecessor P ends with Goto(B,args): substitute B.params[i]->args[i] in all Prim and Term Var fields, append B stmts to P, set P terminator to B substituted terminator, remove B. Use rename_prim/rename_term from ir_inline.rs as exhaustive reference. Unit tests: single-predecessor fuses; multi-predecessor untouched; entry-as-host; A->B->C chain; If-targeted block untouched.
title: fz-ul4.fus.2: fuse_blocks pass + unit tests (src/ir_fuse.rs)
